inputs.text: 章邯, Qin-Han transition period, late Qin general in black Qin armor inside a field command area, Qin banners, chariot wheel silhouette, soldiers waiting in formation, bamboo military orders on a table, stern commander turning slightly toward the battlefield, tired eyes, pressure of collapsing Qin military system, realistic and complex, not villainous, semi-realistic guofeng card illustration, ancient book paper grain, bronze and stone texture, dark palette with restrained gold accents, cinematic lighting, vertical 3:4 composition, no card frame baked into the art
